contents:
# Trump Assassination Attempt Sparks New Wave of Conspiracy Disinformation

## Overview
A new assassination attempt against Donald Trump occurred, the third in two years, immediately followed by conspiracy theories and disinformation spread on social media. AI-manipulated images using Google Gemini falsely linked a mentalist's performance to the incident. No evidence connects the mentalist to the shooting; confusion arose from edited visuals and misleading posts.[2]

## Details
EDMO's Weekly Watch highlighted the disinformation risks, noting IBERIFER's analysis of the AI-altered image evoking false foresight of the attack. The campaign amplified conspiracy narratives post-event. This fits patterns of coordinated inauthentic behavior around high-profile political violence.[2]

**Location**: United States

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @SchizointReL, which covers intelligence operations, cyber warfare, disinformation. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following intelligence operations will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
